description: Travel week with only three trainable days; preserve key stimulus without cramming a normal week into three days.

prev_plans_md:
prev_week_km: 44
Base W3 planned 44 km, five run days, long run 14 km.
prev_feedback_md: RPE 6/10. Completed all runs. Travel next week means only Tue, Thu, Sun are realistic for running.
input.user_request_md: 下周出差，只能周二、周四、周日跑。别让我酒店跑步机跑太久。

schema_validity.behavior: valid WeeklyPlan matching the three available run dates

safety_load.behavior: reduces volume rather than stacking too much into three days

progression.behavior: treats travel as a planned down week from 44 km

signal_response.behavior: stable signals allow moderate training but travel constraint dominates

weekly_distribution.behavior: uses Tue/Thu/Sun sensibly with rest or mobility between

nutrition_alignment.behavior: travel meals remain practical and support the long run

request_handling.behavior: explicitly respects Tue/Thu/Sun and treadmill constraint

anti_patterns: two hard sessions in a travel week
long treadmill workout despite the user request
